name: yloader
description: Self-hosted yt-dlp web wrapper with React UI and Node backend

scripts.docker:start:plain: docker compose --progress plain build backend && docker compose --progress plain build frontend && docker compose up -d --remove-orphans
scripts.docker:start:fresh: docker compose --progress plain build --no-cache --pull backend && docker compose --progress plain build --no-cache --pull frontend && docker compose up -d --remove-orphans
